audit_items.proof_trace: When hasFeeAggregator==true (line 318), transferForSwap is called unconditionally at line 321 before the for-loop that sets s_auctionStarts[asset]=block.timestamp at line 353 — the ordering invariant holds. When hasFeeAggregator==false (feeAggregator==address(this)), skipping transferForSwap is by design: checkUpkeep (line 257) already reads balanceOf(address(this)), so tokens are already in the auction contract and a self-transfer would be a no-op; _setFeeAggregator (line 569) explicitly permits address(this) as a valid configuration.
